case_title: HEDA BOSCOE DBA 587 CASTRO HAIR SALON VS CALLAHAN JONATHAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY HEDA BOSCOE DBA 587 CASTRO HAIR SALON AS TO DEFENDANT CALLAHAN JONATHAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-31-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HEDA BOSCOE DBA 587 CASTRO HAIR SALON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CALLAHAN JONATHAN DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. CONTINUANCE GRANTED RELYING ON PLAINTIFF DECLARATION OF NATURE GIVEN. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEF. JONATHAN CALLAHAN WAS PRESENT AT THE 8:00 AM ROLL CALL IN DEPT. 1, RM 310. DEF. WAS NOT AWARE OF TH CON'T FOR 9/25/92.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HEDA BOSCOE DBA 587 CASTRO HAIR SALON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CALLAHAN JONATHAN DISM W/O PREJUDICE. CON'T GRANTED RELYING ON PLFT DECL OF NOTICE GIVEN THEREFORE NOTICE NOT GIVEN & STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CALLAHAN JONATHAN
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-31-1992, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO SEP-25-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 06
